About.title: About Us
About.subtitle: Your trusted source for trading cards

story.title: Our Story
story.p1: TCG Vault was founded with a simple mission: to provide collectors and players with the best selection of trading cards at competitive prices. What started as a small local shop has grown into a trusted online destination for TCG enthusiasts across the region.
story.p2: We specialize in Pokémon, Yu-Gi-Oh!, One Piece, and Magic: The Gathering cards, offering everything from budget-friendly singles to premium graded collectibles.

quality.title: Quality First
quality.desc: Every card is carefully inspected and professionally graded

customer.title: Customer Focus
customer.desc: Your satisfaction is our top priority

why.title: Why Choose TCG Vault?
why.l1: Authentic products with verified authenticity guarantee
why.l2: Professional card grading and condition assessment

Contact.title: Contact Us
Contact.subtitle: We'd love to hear from you
Contact.name: Name
Contact.success: Message sent! We will reply within 24 hours.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: Your privacy is important to us

section1.title: Information We Collect
section1.p1: We collect information that you provide directly to us, including:

section2.title: How We Use Your Information
section2.p1: We use the information we collect to:
section2.l2: Communicate with you about your purchases
section2.l4: Send you promotional offers (with your consent)

section3.title: Data Protection
section3.p1: We implement appropriate security measures to protect your personal information against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction. Your payment information is encrypted using industry-standard security protocols.

section4.title: Third-Party Disclosure
section4.p1: We do not sell, trade, or otherwise transfer your personal information to outside parties. We may share information with trusted service providers who assist us in operating our website, conducting our business, or servicing you.

eligibility.title: Eligibility for Refunds
eligibility.p1: We offer refunds under the following conditions:
eligibility.l3: Items not as described on our website
eligibility.l4: Request made within 14 days of delivery

process.title: Refund Process
process.l1: Contact us at support@tcgvault.com within 14 days
process.l2: Provide your order number and reason for refund
process.l3: Return the item in original condition
process.l4: Refunds are processed within 5-7 business days

nonRefundable.title: Non-Refundable Items
nonRefundable.p1: The following items cannot be refunded:
nonRefundable.l1: Opened or used trading card products
nonRefundable.l4: Items returned after 14 days of delivery

method.title: Refund Method
method.p1: Refunds will be issued to the original payment method. Please allow 5-10 business days for the refund to appear in your account after processing.

shipping.title: Shipping Policy
shipping.subtitle: Fast and secure delivery to your door

methods.title: Shipping Methods
methods.l1: Standard Shipping: 5-7 business days - Free for orders over 200 SAR
methods.l4: International Shipping: 7-14 business days - Calculated at checkout

packaging.title: Packaging
packaging.p1: All trading cards are carefully packaged to ensure safe delivery:
packaging.l1: Cards are placed in protective sleeves and top loaders
packaging.l2: Products are wrapped in bubble wrap
packaging.l3: Boxes are reinforced with packing materials
packaging.l4: Graded cards get extra protection with hard cases

processing.title: Processing Time
processing.l1: Orders are processed within 1-2 business days
processing.l2: Custom orders may take 3-5 business days
processing.l3: Pre-orders ship on the release date
processing.l4: Tracking information is sent via email once shipped

international.title: International Shipping
international.p1: We ship internationally to select countries. Please note:
international.l1: Customs fees and taxes are the responsibility of the buyer
international.l2: International orders may be subject to customs inspections
international.l4: Contact us for shipping availability to your country

address.title: Shipping Address
address.p1: Please ensure your shipping address is correct at checkout. We are not responsible for orders delivered to incorrect addresses provided by the customer.

acceptance.title: Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.p1: By accessing and using the TCG Vault website, you accept and agree to be bound by the terms and provision of this agreement. If you do not agree to abide by these terms, please do not use this service.

license.title: Use License
license.p1: Permission is granted to temporarily use TCG Vault for personal, non-commercial transitory viewing only. This is the grant of a license, not a transfer of title, and under this license you may not:
license.l2: Use the materials for any commercial purpose
license.l3: Transfer the materials to another person
license.l4: Attempt to reverse engineer any software contained in the website

productInfo.title: Product Information
productInfo.p1: We strive to provide accurate product descriptions and images. However:
productInfo.l1: Colors may appear differently on your monitor
productInfo.l2: Card conditions are based on our professional grading
productInfo.l3: We reserve the right to correct any pricing errors
productInfo.l4: Product availability is subject to change without notice

orders.title: Orders and Payments
orders.l1: All orders are subject to acceptance and availability
orders.l2: Payment must be received before order processing
orders.l3: We accept major credit cards and digital payments
orders.l4: Orders may be cancelled if payment cannot be verified

liability.title: Limitation of Liability
liability.p1: TCG Vault shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages, including without limitation, loss of profits, data, use, goodwill, or other intangible losses resulting from your use of our website.

changes.title: Changes to Terms
changes.p1: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Your continued use of the website following any changes indicates your acceptance of the new terms.
